Long qualification cycles in space solar, IR optics, fiber preforms make respecification costly per pos_technology_germanium_franchise.

Hoboken 2026 maintenance shutdown is scheduled and modest in absolute EBITDA impact, but Specialty's complex-feed feedstock advantage runs through Hoboken — the germanium-bearing residues feedstock flow is the structural Hoboken-Specialty linkage per pos_site_hoboken downstream_dependencies.

Macro time-limited verdict on the franchise: 'capturable but time-limited — Western substitution feasible 3-5 years once scrap-recovery and primary routes qualify ... treat as monetise-now niche, not permanent moat'. The 3-5 year horizon mathematically lands inside the 2028 resolution window at its lower bound — central explanatory variable for the prior settling at 0.55 not 0.65.

cross_segment_TL_bleed_from_other_bets.channel: Specialty premium driven by China germanium / antimony / gallium export-control regime (compliance-moat enforcement on critical minerals overlapping defence/space-solar demand-pull)
cross_segment_TL_bleed_from_other_bets.directionality_rule: Per B4's metadata.cross_segment_TL_bleed_to_other_bets entry to B5 (authored before B5): 'B4 → B5 propagation magnitude is smaller than B4 → B1 because B5 is structurally insulated by T3 alone with B4 contributing only marginal demand-pull through compliance enforcement.' When B4 Layer 1 (regulatory persistence) widens via T4 enforcement-teeth + T3 USTR overcapacity remedy + DFARS Section 842 implementing rule pull-forward + CRMA funding disbursement, B5 reads the +1 magnitude reinforcement on the defence-tier monetisation channel. When B4 Layer 1 compresses via Phase-2 carve-out OR MOFCOM germanium voluntary suspension (B4's 'moat fragments / asymmetric Specialty collapse' scenario, 6% probability), B5 reads the -2 magnitude erosion — this is the rare scenario where B4's TL erosion concentrates on the Specialty node rather than the BMS node. B4 → B5 reverse-coupling is structurally important because B4 was authored before B5 and surfaces this propagation explicitly in its own metadata; B5 must honour the coupling reciprocally.
cross_segment_TL_bleed_from_other_bets.step5_propagation_rewiring_note: B4 → B5 cross-segment TL bleed weight 0.4 is the secondary cross-segment TL transmission identified by B4. T4 → B5 explicit weight 0.4 entry in T4.propagation_to_bets_seed already carries this in B5's theme_dependencies as the secondary T4 demand-pull channel. The reverse-coupling acknowledgement here ensures: (a) B5 reads B4-bear-on-Specialty-perimeter directly via the dedicated cross-segment channel (not just via T4), avoiding the under-counting flagged in B4's step5 note, (b) B5's tail scenario 'tail_mofcom_phase_2_voluntary_germanium_suspension_premium_evaporates' (10% probability) is structurally aligned with B4's 'moat fragments / asymmetric Specialty collapse' scenario (6% probability) — they are the same world-state observed from two different bet perspectives, with B5's slightly higher probability reflecting the Specialty-perimeter-specific exposure being more direct than B4's cross-segment exposure; (c) B5's 'tail_grand_bargain_full_premium_collapse_specialty_re_scoped' (5% probability) is structurally aligned with B4's 'tail_grand_bargain_full_premium_collapse' (2% probability) — B5's higher probability reflecting Specialty's more direct germanium / gallium channel exposure to a grand bargain. Aggregate probability of joint-failure modes B4-bear AND B5-bear: ~7-10% per the reverse-coupling reading.

bets.label: Corporate optionality preservation through the FY2028 BMS resolution window
bets.segment: Group / corporate (cushion bet — internal capital + governance posture, not segment-specific)

intermediate_gates.name: Q1 2026 trading update — segment-level FCF disclosure go-live
intermediate_gates.what_resolves: Per pos_governance_segment_fcf_disclosure_commitment, all five Convergence debate participants demanded quarterly segment FCF disclosure starting with the 24 April 2026 Q1 update. Implementation makes the cushion arithmetic (Catalysis + Recycling combined Adjusted EBITA vs BMS drag) auditable from outside; non-implementation is itself a B6 bear signal because it allows the foundation cushion to be re-baselined under opaque framing. Already crossed at as_of 2026-05-04 — first reading point for the bet.

intermediate_gates.name: FY2025 dividend cycle (proposed EUR 0.50 paid in 2026, AGM)
intermediate_gates.what_resolves: Dividend partial restoration EUR 0.25 → proposed EUR 0.50 (still well below the EUR 0.80 pre-crisis level) is the nearest dividend signal. B6 reads-true if the EUR 0.50 proposal carries unchanged into the FY2026 cycle (March/April 2027) without a second cut; reads-false if the dividend is cut again or suspended. Concurrent shareholder activism / vote outcomes at AGM are a secondary signal on Belgian-listing posture.

intermediate_gates.name: Board kill-criteria formalisation deadline (Convergence-prescribed pre-Q1 2027)
intermediate_gates.what_resolves: Per pos_governance_board_kill_criteria_pending: Board Member's non-negotiable demand from Convergence Round 2 was binding kill criteria formalised before the next quarterly meeting. Resolution-true reading: board publishes formal kill criteria (positive unit economics by Q3 2027 + minimum utilisation thresholds + pre-approved partnership / exit process). Resolution-false reading: criteria deferred or replaced by 're-baselining' language — governance failure mode that pre-commits the optionality cushion to indefinite BMS funding.

intermediate_gates.name: FY2026 leverage covenant test + FY2026 cash generation read
intermediate_gates.what_resolves: First post-baseline annual print of the cushion arithmetic. Loss of the EUR 525m gold sale-and-leaseback boost in the YoY comparable means FY2026 cash conversion must come from operations or leverage drifts higher. Reading rule: net debt / Adjusted EBITDA staying below ~2.0x with FY2026 FCF clearly positive ex-WC unwind = cushion holds; net debt / EBITDA drifting to 2.0-2.5x with FCF negative ex-WC = cushion eroding. CFO non-negotiable from Convergence: 'one-time levers are exhausted' — the next leverage improvement must come from operational cash conversion, not balance-sheet engineering.

intermediate_gates.name: Q3 2027 BMS proof-gate — board action on pass/fail
intermediate_gates.what_resolves: The single load-bearing intermediate gate inherited from B1: independent commercial audit of BMS positive segment FCF on shipped volumes. B6 reads-true if (i) the board enforces the gate cleanly (either a pass with capital ceiling intact, or a fail with structured partnership / partial divestiture initiated on Umicore's timeline rather than under external pressure) AND (ii) the foundation cushion has not been forcibly reallocated pre-emptively. B6 reads-false if the board defers the gate, fires kill criteria pre-emptively pre-Q3 2027 (B1 tail scenario), or executes a forced firesale carve-out at distressed valuation.

intermediate_gates.name: FY2027 dividend cycle + FY2027 covenant test
intermediate_gates.what_resolves: Penultimate dividend cycle before resolution date. Reading rule: dividend held at EUR 0.50 or above and net debt / Adjusted EBITDA inside an IG-equivalent corridor (per pos_balance_sheet_net_debt_leverage) confirms the cushion has held through the proof-gate window; a second dividend cut paired with leverage above 2.5x confirms the slow-burn cushion erosion path.

bets.prior_rationale: B6 is the cushion bet — its prior is mechanically the joint probability that the optionality cushion (balance-sheet + governance + strategic flexibility) holds through the FY2026-FY2028 stress window WITHOUT direct world-state propagation. The prior settles at 0.55 from a layered build. (1) BALANCE-SHEET LAYER (anchors above 0.50). FY2025 net debt EUR 1,357m and leverage 1.6x are inside an IG-equivalent posture today; the EUR 1,559m cash position provides immediate liquidity headroom; the dividend was already cut from EUR 0.80 to EUR 0.25 in 2024 and partially restored to EUR 0.50, meaning the most painful defensive lever has already been pulled; the EUR 525m gold sale-and-leaseback closed in FY2025 has bought strategic time even if it flatters the headline cash flow number; the foundation cushion (Catalysis EUR 383m + Recycling EUR 296m = EUR 679m FY2025 Adjusted EBIT, EUR 755m including Specialty) provides the patience capital to fund EUR 100-200m of incremental BMS losses through Q3 2027 if the foundation segments hold their economics. (2) GOVERNANCE LAYER (anchors near 0.50, two-sided). The Belgian 30% mandatory-bid threshold is a defensive shield against hostile stake-build but NOT against opportunistic friendly carve-out (Convergence S-3-1 forced-decision could fire a JV / tolling / partial exit at the board's hand); the board kill-criteria formalisation is PENDING — this is a NEGATIVE-SPACE position, the active decision so far has been NOT to set formal criteria, and the Convergence stream's most prominent unanimous demand is to fix this within the next quarterly cycle; segment-level FCF disclosure is also pending implementation but the regime starts 24 April 2026; the CEO's Q3 2027 proof-gate non-negotiable is stated but not yet board-formalised; quarterly cash gates demanded by all five debate participants. The asymmetry: governance is the pivot — formalised kill criteria + segment FCF disclosure + cash gates clearing in the next 9 months would re-rate B6 toward 0.65; failure to formalise within the window pulls toward 0.45. (3) STRATEGIC FLEXIBILITY LAYER (mildly supportive). CORE plan capex envelope EUR 310m FY2025 (-44% YoY); BMS capex narrowed to Nysa + Korea; 150 kt European battery recycling deferred to 2032+; EUR 100m efficiency programme delivered ahead of EUR 70m target; the EUR 400m Hoboken capex (concentrated EUR ~300m in 2027-2028) competes for foundation cash precisely during the stress window — this is the principal internal capex tension. (4) JOINT-DISTRIBUTION DEPENDENCY (the load-bearing factor that pulls below 0.65). B6 has NO direct theme propagation; the cushion's stress comes through B1/B2/B3/B7 break-shapes hitting balance sheet + governance simultaneously. From B2's prior (0.60 truth-likelihood 0.62), the slow-burn-envelope-breach scenario at 13% probability fires the foundation cushion below EUR 600m FY2027 — direct B6 erosion path; from B3's prior (0.62 truth-likelihood 0.65), the gold-cliff margin-call scenario at 5% probability fires the EUR 525m sale-and-leaseback structure into margin call AND compresses Recycling EBITDA by EUR 250-350m simultaneously — the most acute B6 erosion path; from B1's tail scenario at 5% probability, the foundation cushion compresses pre-Q3 2027 forcing premature kill criteria — B6 break IS that scenario firing; from B4's central-bear (40% probability) the BMS premium pricing collapses into commodity-with-attestation pricing which bleeds through B1 stress into B6 stress with a 12-18 month lag. The unconditional joint-failure probability across the four bets through FY2028 is approximately: P(B1 break) ~ 0.70, P(B2 break) ~ 0.38, P(B3 break) ~ 0.35, P(joint stress firing simultaneously enough to break the cushion) ~ 0.30-0.40 because the stresses are positively correlated (T6 demand cliff hurts both BMS and Catalysis; gold/PGM cycle hurts both Recycling and the leaseback structure; EU industrial cost lift hits all three EU-located segments). Net-net the prior settles at 0.55 — clearly above 0.50 because (a) FY2025 baseline metrics (1.6x leverage, EUR 1,559m cash, EUR 679m foundation cushion, partially-restored dividend) provide real cushion today, (b) the heaviest defensive lever (dividend cut + capex cut + 150 kt recycling deferral) has already been pulled, (c) the balance-sheet position has an explicit safety margin of ~EUR 200-300m before covenant or activist pressure becomes binding, (d) the EUR 1,559m cash position decouples the cushion from refinancing-window timing risk over the bet horizon — but well below 0.65 because (i) joint-distribution risk across B1+B2+B3+B7 is non-trivial and the stresses are correlated, (ii) governance still has THREE pending formalisation gaps (kill criteria, segment FCF disclosure follow-through, quarterly cash gates) any one of which firing negative re-rates the prior, (iii) one-time levers ARE exhausted per CFO non-negotiable so the next leverage improvement must come from sub-20% FCF conversion that is NOT yet visible — the CORE 'cash generation pivot' has NOT delivered (FY2025 underlying FCF only EUR 145m on EUR 847m Adjusted EBITDA; WC build EUR 261m; FCF conversion ~17%), (iv) Hoboken EUR 400m capex hits exactly during the stress window forcing internal capital competition. The 0.55 prior reflects the joint-distribution asymmetry: the cushion is materially likelier to hold than to break across each individual bet, but the multiplicative joint-survival probability across four coupled bets in a positively-correlated stress regime sits squarely in the 0.50-0.60 band.
bets.thesis_resolves_true: By FY2028 Umicore's strategic + capital + governance flexibility holds across the BMS resolution window such that: (i) the board enforces the Q3 2027 BMS proof-gate cleanly — either a pass with capital ceiling intact and CORE plan continuity, or a fail with structured partnership / partial divestiture initiated on Umicore's timeline (not forced by external liquidity pressure or activist intervention), (ii) the foundation cushion (Catalysis + Recycling combined Adjusted EBITA) holds above EUR 550-600m through FY2027 — funding BMS patience capital without requiring the EUR 525m gold sale-and-leaseback to be unwound or recapitalised at unfavourable terms, (iii) net debt / Adjusted EBITDA stays inside an IG-equivalent corridor through FY2028 (~1.5-2.2x sustained, no covenant trip), (iv) dividend policy holds at the EUR 0.50/share partially-restored level through the FY2026 + FY2027 cycles without a second cut — confirming that the dividend signalling tool was used once defensively (FY2024 EUR 0.80→0.25) and is not being re-pulled, (v) the Belgian 30% mandatory-bid governance constraint is not breached by hostile stake-build or activist concert party — Umicore retains autonomy on partnership / strategic-investor structuring choices for any BMS S-3-1 forced-decision (JV, tolling, partial exit), (vi) board kill criteria are formalised before Q1 2027 (per Convergence Board Member non-negotiable) AND quarterly segment-level FCF disclosure is implemented and sustained through resolution — making the cushion arithmetic externally auditable rather than re-baselineable, (vii) Hoboken EUR 400m capex programme proceeds without cost over-run >15% or schedule slippage >9 months — the principal internal capex tension is contained, (viii) strategic decisions (Specialty divestiture optionality? BMS partial divestiture? Hoboken IPO/spin?) remain on Umicore's timeline rather than being forced by external pressure, AND (ix) the gold sale-and-leaseback structure remains intact through resolution — gold spot does not breach the USD 1,800-2,000/oz CFO-stress threshold in any sustained way, no margin call, no premature unwind. Resolution-true does NOT require the foundation cushion to expand or the BMS bet itself to clear — it requires the optionality envelope to be preserved long enough to make the BMS resolution outcome (whichever way it lands) a CHOSEN board action rather than a forced firesale.
bets.thesis_resolves_false: The bet resolves false in any of three structurally different ways. Most likely: a slow-burn cushion erosion path where (a) the joint distribution of B1-B3 stress fires partially through 2026-2027 (B2 slow-burn scenario at 13% probability and/or B3 slow-grind scenario at the upper 30-50% probability range collectively pulling combined foundation cushion FY2027 below EUR 580m), (b) the lost EUR 525m gold gain in the FY2026 YoY comparable forces leverage to drift toward 2.0-2.3x without operational cash conversion stepping up materially (CORE 'cash generation pivot' not delivering — sub-20% FCF conversion sustained), (c) Hoboken EUR 400m capex hits as scheduled in 2027-2028 absorbing EUR 300m of cushion concurrently, (d) the FY2027 dividend cycle requires a second dividend cut from EUR 0.50 to defend leverage — a SIGNAL of cushion erosion that itself accelerates the path because the Belgian listing's yield-investor base re-rates and shareholder activism opens. In this slow-burn path Umicore is not insolvent, leverage stays below 3.0x, but optionality is materially compressed: BMS partnership / divestiture is forced into a buyer's market (LFP environment, limited willing buyers) and the board cannot wait for the Q3 2027 proof-gate auditor verification to complete before initiating the structured-partnership track. Less likely but more abrupt: a tail-governance failure path (this IS B1's 'tail_governance_failure_premature_kill' scenario at 5% probability firing) where the foundation cushion compresses pre-emptively before Q3 2027 — gold corrects to USD 1,800-2,000/oz on Fed-pivot real-rates regime AND/OR Catalysis hits an unexpected ROCE wall (premium-OEM platform-life award loss, T5 escalation, T2 second energy shock) AND/OR Hoboken EUR 400m capex slides materially with cost over-run — patience capital runs out. Board fires kill criteria pre-emptively in 2026-Q1 2027 to protect group ROCE; BMS is forced into structured partnership / sale BEFORE the proof-gate matures. Concurrent T2 second-energy-shock plausibly exacerbates. B6 break IS this scenario firing. Tail-but-non-trivial: a gold-cliff + leaseback margin-call + forced carve-out path (this IS B3's 'gold_cliff_margin_call_b7_contagion_foundation_breaks' scenario at 5% probability firing through B6) where gold corrects past USD 1,800-2,000/oz on a Fed sustained-higher-for-longer regime, the EUR 525m sale-and-leaseback structure faces margin call simultaneously with Recycling EBITDA compression of EUR 250-350m, B7 cash-conversion stress fires, the board faces choice between (a) reverse-leaseback at unfavourable terms, (b) accelerated capex-pause on Hoboken, (c) emergency BMS kill-criteria firing pre-emptively, or (d) opportunistic stake-build by a strategic investor (Glencore / a Korean cell-maker / a sovereign-wealth vehicle) at distressed valuation — the Belgian 30% mandatory-bid rule does NOT prevent a friendly carve-out at distressed terms. In all three false paths, the BMS resolution outcome (regardless of B1's own truth-likelihood) is forced rather than chosen: the optionality envelope itself collapses irrespective of customer execution at BMS. The S-3-1 forced-decision (JV, tolling, partial exit) on BMS becomes pre-determined, and the Hoboken EUR 400m capex programme is partially deferred or carved out — degrading the foundation franchise simultaneously with the BMS endgame.

scenarios.name: central_path_cushion_holds_optionality_preserved
scenarios.narrative: B1 reads its central or partial-clearance path; B2 stays inside +/-15% envelope (FY2028 EBITA EUR 326-380m); B3 reads its central margin-compression path with foundation Recycling EBITA in EUR 220-300m range; B7 cash conversion improves modestly (FCF conversion drifts from 17% to 25-30% by FY2027 as WC unwinds). Combined Catalysis + Recycling foundation cushion FY2027 lands EUR 580-650m — just above the BMS cross-subsidy break point. Net debt / Adjusted EBITDA holds in 1.7-2.1x corridor through FY2027 (drifts up modestly post-EUR 525m gold gain disappearing in YoY comparable, but offset by gradual operating cash improvement and Hoboken capex landing in measured tranches). Dividend held at EUR 0.50/share through FY2026 + FY2027 cycles. Board formalises binding kill criteria pre-Q1 2027 (Board Member non-negotiable cleared); segment FCF disclosure goes live 24 April 2026 cleanly with gold sale-and-leaseback stripped out; quarterly cash gates operationalised. Q3 2027 BMS proof-gate enforced cleanly: either marginal pass with capital ceiling intact (B1 central path) or controlled fail with structured partnership initiated on Umicore's timeline. Belgian 30% mandatory-bid threshold not approached; no opportunistic stake-build. Hoboken EUR 400m capex on schedule. Specialty Materials divestiture stays optional rather than forced. Optionality envelope preserved through resolution.
scenarios.what_makes_this_path_break: B2 slow-burn-envelope-breach fires in 2026-2027 (13% B2 probability) compressing Catalysis EBITA below EUR 326m; OR B3 slow-grind upper-end gold correction toward EUR 3,000-3,300/oz compresses Recycling EBITA to EUR 200-230m faster than expected; OR Hoboken EUR 400m capex slips with >15% cost over-run; OR governance gates (kill criteria, segment FCF) not formalised within window — pulls toward slow_burn_cushion_erosion scenario.

scenarios.name: slow_burn_cushion_erosion_optionality_compressed
scenarios.narrative: The most likely B6-break scenario, driven by partial joint stress across B1+B2+B3 without a single tail event firing. Through 2026: BMS losses run at upper end of EUR -100 to -150m EBIT range as IONWAY/PowerCo call-offs slip and AESC commissioning delays (B1 slow-burn central-bear); Catalysis prints EUR 360-370m FY2026 EBITA (modest miss vs EUR 376m central) on Cox US HEV share volatility around 14% midpoint; Recycling reports EUR 240-270m FY2026 EBITA on a 10-15% gold correction toward EUR 3,500-3,800/oz (B3 gold-compression slow-grind, ~30% B3 probability). FY2026 cash flow loses the EUR 525m gold gain in YoY comparable; underlying operating cash flow EUR 350-450m without the boost; FCF conversion stays sub-25%. Net debt drifts to EUR 1,500-1,650m by FY2027; leverage drifts to 2.0-2.4x. Hoboken EUR 400m capex hits as scheduled in 2027-2028 absorbing EUR 300m of cushion concurrently. By FY2027 the foundation cushion (Catalysis + Recycling combined) prints EUR 540-590m — at or just below BMS cross-subsidy break point. Board faces choice: (a) second dividend cut from EUR 0.50 to EUR 0.25 to defend leverage (a SIGNAL of cushion erosion that itself accelerates yield-investor exit and re-opens shareholder activism), (b) Hoboken capex pause (degrading B3 franchise long-term), or (c) pre-emptive BMS kill-criteria firing before Q3 2027 proof-gate matures. Board chooses (a) AND (c): dividend cut AND BMS structured-partnership initiation Q1-Q2 2027 — BEFORE the auditor-verified proof-gate completes. Belgian 30% mandatory-bid threshold not breached (no hostile bid materialises despite pressure) but a friendly carve-out at low valuation is executed (an opportunistic Korean cell-maker / Glencore / sovereign-wealth vehicle takes a 25-29% stake in BMS-segment carve-out at distressed valuation). Optionality is materially compressed: Umicore is not insolvent, leverage stays below 2.5x, but the BMS resolution outcome was forced rather than chosen, and Specialty divestiture optionality has been deferred to defend cash. CORE plan effectively re-cast as 'Foundation focus + residual BMS niche under partner ownership'.
scenarios.what_makes_this_path_break: B2 + B3 both clear their central paths with foundation cushion holding above EUR 600m FY2027 — pulls back to central_path. OR Hoboken EUR 400m capex schedule slips to 2028+ (deferring cushion absorption out of stress window). OR FCF conversion steps up to 30%+ via WC unwind faster than expected. OR board declines to fire pre-emptive kill criteria, holds for Q3 2027 auditor verification — preserves procedural optionality even if cushion is thin.

scenarios.name: tail_governance_failure_premature_kill_b1_tail_fires
scenarios.narrative: This IS B1's 'tail_governance_failure_premature_kill' scenario (5% B1 probability) firing — restated through B6's lens as a cushion-bet break. Foundation cushion compresses pre-Q3 2027: gold corrects 20-30% toward USD 3,200-3,500/oz (not yet breaching the USD 1,800-2,000/oz CFO-stress reference but enough to compress Recycling EBITDA EUR 70-150m via the EUR 70-100m / EUR 500/oz Umicore-disclosed sensitivity); concurrently Catalysis hits an unexpected ROCE wall — either a premium-OEM platform-life award loss to JM Catalyst Technologies post-Honeywell deal (B2 platform-award-share-loss-cliff scenario at 5% B2 probability firing), OR T5 escalation 'pgm_thrifting_and_substitution_bites' compressing autocatalyst pricing power, OR Hoboken EUR 400m capex slides materially with cost over-run. Combined foundation cushion FY2027 falls to EUR 450-540m — clearly below the EUR 600m BMS cross-subsidy break point. Concurrent T2 second-energy-shock plausibly exacerbates (TTF >EUR 60 sustained, ETS >EUR 100/tCO2). Net debt drifts to EUR 1,650-1,850m; leverage tests 2.5-3.0x corridor. Patience capital runs out. Board fires kill criteria pre-emptively in 2026-Q1 2027 to protect group ROCE — BEFORE the proof-gate can mature. BMS forced into structured partnership / sale at distressed valuation (LFP environment, limited willing buyers); second BMS impairment EUR 800-1,500m recognised against the EUR 2.0bn capital base. Dividend cut a second time, EUR 0.50 → EUR 0.10-0.20. Specialty divestiture initiated to defend cash, executed at lower-than-target valuation. The optionality envelope itself collapses; the BMS resolution outcome was forced not chosen. By FY2028 BMS effectively wound down with residual AESC tolling structure; Specialty franchise carved out; CORE plan effectively replaced by a 'foundation-only' strategic narrative.
scenarios.what_makes_this_path_break: Foundation cushion holds (Catalysis above EUR 350m FY2027 AND Recycling above EUR 240m) AND board declines to fire kill criteria pre-emptively. OR T5 + T6 + T2 stresses do not fire concurrently in the same 18-month window. OR gold correction limited to <15% (stays above EUR 3,500/oz). The path is conditional on simultaneous foundation-side stress, which has only modest joint probability.

scenarios.name: tail_gold_cliff_leaseback_margin_call_b3_contagion
scenarios.narrative: This IS B3's 'gold_cliff_margin_call_b7_contagion_foundation_breaks' scenario (5% B3 probability, restated to ~10% in B6 because B6 reads ALL paths in which the leaseback fires regardless of whether B3 itself breaks operationally) firing through B6. Gold corrects past the CFO-stress USD 1,800-2,000/oz reference (~50-55% downside from May 2026 EUR 4,000/oz spot) within the bet horizon. Drivers: Fed pivots to sustained higher-for-longer real rates above 2.5%; coordinated central-bank gold-sales programme; EUR/USD strengthening to 1.30+ amplifying EUR-denominated correction; concurrent Ukraine ceasefire de-risking removes geopolitical premium. The EUR 525m sale-and-leaseback structure faces margin call: ongoing lease economics deteriorate as relet pricing resets, the recirculating-inventory lease costs become unsustainable at the compressed gold price. Recycling reported EBITDA compresses by EUR 250-350m vs FY2025 baseline (Umicore EUR 70-100m / EUR 500/oz disclosure x ~2,500 EUR/oz cumulative decline). B7 cash-conversion stress fires — board faces choice between (a) reverse-leaseback transaction at unfavourable terms (recapitalising the structure with cash to avoid margin call, consumes EUR 300-500m of cash), (b) accelerated capex-pause on Hoboken EUR 400m programme (degrading B3 franchise long-term, payback path lost), (c) emergency BMS kill-criteria firing pre-emptively to reallocate cash, OR (d) opportunistic stake-build by strategic investor (Glencore for the recycling franchise, a Korean cell-maker for BMS, sovereign-wealth vehicle for the group) at distressed valuation. The Belgian 30% mandatory-bid rule does NOT prevent a friendly carve-out at distressed terms — it only prevents hostile crossing of 30%. Board likely executes a BLEND: emergency reverse-leaseback at modestly-unfavourable terms + Hoboken capex partial deferral + accelerated BMS structured-partnership. Foundation cushion compresses to EUR 250-350m — INSUFFICIENT for BMS patience capital. Net debt swings UP to EUR 1,800-2,100m on cash absorption; leverage tests 3.0-3.5x corridor; covenant tested but possibly not breached if banks waive. Dividend suspended entirely. Multiple impairments recognised: BMS EUR 800-1,500m (per B1 tail), plus partial Hoboken-capex impairment if programme is paused. Concurrent T2 second-energy-shock plausibly exacerbates if Fed-tightening macro is also recessionary. Specialty divestiture executed at distressed valuation. By FY2028 Umicore is operationally intact but financially recapitalised — equity dilution likely if partnership / carve-out involves equity issuance to cure leverage. Optionality envelope completely collapsed.
scenarios.what_makes_this_path_break: Gold corrects only modestly (15-25%) without breaching margin-call threshold — pulls back to slow_burn_cushion_erosion. OR Fed reverses real-rates trajectory before gold breaches USD 2,500/oz — pulls toward central_path. OR coordinated central-bank gold-sales programme NOT materialising (gold floor holds at USD 3,000-3,500/oz despite real-rates pressure). OR board executes emergency reverse-leaseback at modestly-unfavourable but not-stressed terms — partial recovery via cash-conversion path. OR sovereign-wealth or strategic counterparty injects equity at non-distressed valuation.

scenarios.name: positive_tail_cushion_strengthens_optionality_widens
scenarios.narrative: B2 'hybrid_lock_in_durability_overshoots_central_path' scenario (Catalysis EBITA holding EUR 380-440m FY2028) AND B3 'structural_supply_reset_strengthens' scenario (Recycling EBITA EUR 330-400m FY2028) BOTH fire concurrently. Gold holds above EUR 4,000/oz on continued geopolitical / real-rate tailwinds; T5 PGM regime intact across all 6 layers; refiner pricing power intensifies. Combined Catalysis + Recycling foundation cushion FY2027 prints EUR 700-750m — material headroom over BMS cross-subsidy threshold. Concurrent CORE 'cash generation pivot' delivers per management framing: WC unwinds, FCF conversion steps up to 35-45% by FY2027, EUR 100m efficiency programme continues into a EUR 150-200m FY2026-2028 cumulative envelope. Net debt drops to EUR 1,000-1,200m; leverage 1.2-1.5x. Dividend restored toward EUR 0.65-0.80 by FY2027 cycle. Board formalises kill criteria + segment FCF disclosure cleanly + quarterly cash gates operational early; governance modernisation re-rates equity story. Q3 2027 BMS proof-gate enforced on Umicore's terms with margin to spare; either marginal pass with capital ceiling intact (B1 'regulatory_underwriting_premium_widens' scenario at 10% B1 probability) or controlled fail with structured partnership at FAIR (not distressed) valuation. Hoboken EUR 400m capex on schedule; Specialty divestiture optional and timed for valuation upside. Optionality envelope strengthened during the bet window; Umicore enters FY2029 with materially better strategic flexibility than baseline.
scenarios.what_makes_this_path_break: Joint probability of both B2 positive-tail AND B3 positive-tail firing concurrently is low (each ~5% individually, joint correlation positive but not perfect). Either single-side reversion pulls back to central_path. Persistent CORE 'cash generation pivot' realisation requires WC unwind that has NOT yet been visible in FY2025 prints (EUR 261m WC build instead) — durability of the EUR 100m efficiency programme beyond FY2025 is unproven.

named_watch_metrics.threshold_implications: Bull: leverage stays below 2.0x sustained through FY2027 with operational cash conversion (not balance-sheet engineering) driving improvement. Tail: leverage tests 3.0x = tail_gold_cliff or tail_governance_failure scenario firing.

falsification_criteria: Net debt / Adjusted EBITDA leverage tests 2.5x or above for two consecutive reporting periods through FY2028 — covenant proximity AND foundation cushion arithmetic insufficient to absorb additional shock; cushion-bet readable signal failing.

FY2026 OR FY2027 underlying FCF (ex one-off levers) prints below EUR 200m on Adjusted EBITDA above EUR 800m — sub-25% FCF conversion sustained confirms the CORE 'cash generation pivot' is NOT delivering; B7 cash-conversion bet breaks AND B6 cushion erodes.

Combined Catalysis + Recycling foundation EBITA below EUR 600m for FY2026 OR FY2027 — BMS cross-subsidy break point breached; B6 reads slow_burn_cushion_erosion or worse; B1 tail_governance_failure scenario re-rates from 5% to 10-15%.

Dividend cut below EUR 0.50/share in FY2026 OR FY2027 cycle (a second defensive cut following the FY2024 EUR 0.80→0.25 cut and partial restoration to EUR 0.50) — signal cost of the second cut materially exceeds the first; yield-investor exit + shareholder activism re-opens.

Gold spot price sustained <USD 1,800-2,000/oz / EUR 1,500-1,750/oz for any two-month window — CFO stress-test reference threshold breached; EUR 525m sale-and-leaseback structure faces margin call; B7 cash-conversion stress fires AND B6 tail_gold_cliff scenario IS firing.

Board kill criteria for BMS NOT formalised before Q1 2027 (Convergence Board Member non-negotiable not cleared) — Q3 2027 proof-gate becomes non-binding because 're-baselining' framing remains available; cushion implicitly committed to indefinite BMS funding; the cushion-bet's resolution-true mechanism functionally falsified.

Quarterly segment-level FCF disclosure NOT implemented cleanly by Q3 2026 OR fails to strip out gold sale-and-leaseback gain reconciliation — governance failure mode that prevents external auditability of cushion arithmetic; market cannot price what it cannot see.

BMS structured partnership / partial divestiture initiated PRE-emptively before Q3 2027 proof-gate auditor verification — B1 tail_governance_failure scenario fires, kill criteria fired pre-emptively to protect group ROCE; the BMS resolution outcome was forced rather than chosen and the optionality envelope has collapsed.

Belgian 30% mandatory-bid threshold approached or breached by hostile or activist concert party within bet horizon — defensive shield breached; even a friendly carve-out at distressed valuation in this regime indicates external pressure forced the strategic decision.

Hoboken EUR 400m capex programme paused or cost over-run >15% with schedule slippage >9 months — B3 franchise long-term economics degraded AND internal cushion competition forces capital reallocation away from foundation defence; cascade signal that B6 stress is binding.

Specialty Materials divestiture executed within bet horizon under forced (rather than chosen) timing — flagged in Convergence S-3-1 forced-decision space; if the divestiture transacts at discount-to-strategic-value and is timed during peak stress (rather than peak valuation), confirms optionality envelope collapse.

Negative rating-agency action (S&P / Moody's / Fitch downgrade or negative outlook) within bet horizon — refinancing optionality compresses; cushion bet's structural assumption of IG-equivalent corridor breached.
bets.breakage_shape: When B6 breaks, the most likely break-shape is a 18-30 month slow grind that visually resembles a gradual leverage drift and dividend signalling cycle rather than a sharp event. The slow_burn_cushion_erosion path: through 2026 leverage drifts from 1.6x toward 2.0x as the EUR 525m gold sale falls out of the YoY comparable and operational cash conversion stays sub-25% (the CORE 'cash generation pivot' fails to deliver because BMS WC build continues and Hoboken capex begins absorbing cushion); FY2026 H2 segment FCF disclosure (now in place) makes the foundation-cushion compression auditable for the first time; FY2026 dividend held at EUR 0.50 but explicit guidance signals 'capital preservation priority'; combined Catalysis + Recycling FY2026 EBITA prints EUR 620-640m (modest miss vs status-quo path); by Q3 2026 the board faces the kill-criteria formalisation deadline and (in the break path) defers it under 're-baselining' framing — the first explicit governance-failure signal. Through 2027: B2 slow-burn-envelope-breach OR B3 slow-grind margin compression fires (one or both) compressing combined foundation FY2027 to EUR 540-590m; Hoboken EUR 400m capex hits as scheduled absorbing EUR 150-200m of cushion; net debt drifts to EUR 1,500-1,650m, leverage to 2.1-2.4x; FY2026 dividend cycle (March 2027) carries a second cut from EUR 0.50 to EUR 0.25 — the signal-cost of the second cut accelerates the yield-investor exit and re-opens shareholder activism. By Q1-Q2 2027 the board chooses to fire BMS structured-partnership process pre-emptively, BEFORE the Q3 2027 proof-gate auditor verification can complete — the BMS carve-out transacts at a buyer's-market valuation in the LFP environment. Specialty divestiture is initiated to defend cash and executes at lower-than-target valuation. By FY2028 Umicore's CORE plan is effectively re-cast as 'foundation-only with residual BMS niche under partner ownership' — operationally intact, financially recapitalised, but with the optionality envelope materially compressed. The sharper alternative break-shape (tail_gold_cliff_leaseback_margin_call) compresses this to 6-9 months around two coincident inflection events: a Fed pivot to sustained higher-for-longer real rates (typical 4-8 week pricing-in window) cascades to gold breaching USD 2,500/oz on the way to USD 1,800-2,000/oz, simultaneously triggering margin call mechanics on the EUR 525m sale-and-leaseback AND compressing Recycling EBITDA by EUR 250-350m within the same quarter. Cash absorption from emergency reverse-leaseback transactions pushes net debt to EUR 1,800-2,100m and leverage to 3.0-3.5x; covenant tested but possibly waived by banks; multiple impairments recognised. An opportunistic strategic investor (Glencore for the recycling franchise, a Korean cell-maker for BMS, or a sovereign-wealth vehicle for the group) can then approach a board under existential pressure with a friendly carve-out at distressed terms — the Belgian 30% mandatory-bid rule does NOT prevent this because the threshold is breached only by hostile crossing. The tail-governance-failure shape (tail_governance_failure_premature_kill) is the middle-speed path (12-15 months) where the foundation cushion compresses pre-Q3 2027 via concurrent Catalysis ROCE wall + modest gold correction + Hoboken capex slippage; patience capital runs out before the proof-gate matures; board fires kill criteria pre-emptively. In every break path, the Q3 2027 BMS proof-gate is deprived of the ability to function as a binary-resolution mechanism — either because it has been bypassed pre-emptively (tail paths) or because the forced action under cushion stress pre-determines the outcome (slow-burn path). The bet's own definition of 'true' (board enforces gate cleanly, cushion holds, dividend holds, no forced firesale) is not satisfiable. Critically: B6 break almost always cascades into B1 break (the BMS bet) regardless of B1's underlying chemistry / customer dynamics, because the optionality-envelope collapse forces the BMS resolution outcome on the cushion's timeline rather than the proof-gate's timeline.

baseline_research_note.claim_under_test: Umicore preserves its strategic + capital + governance flexibility through Q3 2027 BMS proof-gate and into FY2028 such that (i) the board can re-scope BMS without forced firesale, (ii) the EUR 679m Catalysis + Recycling foundation cushion is not consumed by liquidity stress before BMS resolution, (iii) dividend policy holds at the EUR 0.50/share partially-restored level without further cuts, (iv) net debt / leverage stays inside an IG-equivalent corridor with no covenant trip, (v) the Belgian 30% mandatory-bid governance constraint is not breached by opportunistic stake-build forcing a defensive carve-out, AND (vi) strategic decisions (Specialty divestiture, BMS partial divestiture, Hoboken IPO/spin) remain on Umicore's timeline. B6 is the 'cushion bet' that gates whether the overall thesis (BMS recovery WITHOUT forced firesale) has the runway to play out, irrespective of how B1/B2/B3/B7 individually resolve.
baseline_research_note.what_is_known_today: FY2025 group baseline: revenue EUR 4,049m (group ex-metal pass-through), Adjusted EBITDA EUR 847m, net debt EUR 1,357m (improved from EUR 1,425m FY2024, but driven by EUR 525m gold sale-and-leaseback), leverage 1.60x (improved from 1.87x), cash EUR 1,559m, total assets EUR 9,460m, group equity EUR 2,239m, gearing ratio 37.4%. Underlying operating cash flow ex-gold was EUR 324m vs EUR 869m prior year — gold sale is masking weaker underlying cash generation. FY2025 FCF EUR 145m (Yahoo: EUR 386m including different cash-flow definition); FCF conversion of Adjusted EBITDA ~17%. Working capital EUR 1,522m (build of ~EUR 261m vs prior). Capex EUR 310m (FY2025) vs EUR 555m FY2024 (-44%). Dividend cut from EUR 0.80 to EUR 0.25 in 2024, partial restoration proposed at EUR 0.50/share for FY2025 (paid 2026). Foundation cushion: Catalysis EUR 383m + Recycling EUR 296m = EUR 679m FY2025 Adjusted EBIT; Specialty Materials adds EUR 76m for combined EUR 755m. BMS drag: -EUR 91m EBITA (-19.5% margin, EUR 2.0bn capital employed = 56% of group). CORE plan March 2025: replaced RISE 2030, narrowed BMS capex to Nysa + Korea, deferred 150 kt European battery recycling plant from 2026 to 2032+, achieved EUR 100m efficiency target ahead of EUR 70m. Hoboken EUR 400m capex programme 2025-2028 with EUR ~300m concentrated in 2027-2028 and ~6-year payback (2030-2031 window). Belgian listing UMI.BR, market cap EUR 4.2bn, 240,561,925 shares outstanding, 30% Belgian mandatory-bid threshold. CEO Q3 2027 proof-gate stated commitment but board kill criteria PENDING formal approval (Convergence Board Member non-negotiable). Quarterly segment FCF disclosure unanimously demanded by Convergence, target Q1 2026 trading update on 24 April 2026.
baseline_research_note.contradictions_in_evidence: Three genuine cross-stream tensions on B6 specifically. (1) Reported leverage improvement vs underlying cash generation: the 1.87x → 1.60x leverage improvement is GOLD-SALE-DRIVEN; without the EUR 525m gold sale, leverage 'would likely have deteriorated' (Convergence verdict). The financial stream surface-reads the leverage improvement as positive; the Convergence earnings-quality verdict rates it 'mixed' precisely because the cushion arithmetic is partial today. (2) Dividend signalling: the dividend was cut EUR 0.80 → EUR 0.25 (FY2024 defensive action, EUR 192m cash retained per the original distribution) and then partially restored to EUR 0.50 — the Share Price Analyst reads this as 'balance-sheet repair takes precedence over returns', but the partial restoration also means a SECOND defensive cut would carry a stronger signal cost than the first (already-stressed yield-investor base; index inclusion / dividend-aristocrat status no longer applicable). (3) Foundation cushion durability: macro and convergence both stress the foundation cushion is real BUT durability depends on three simultaneous conditions (gold/PGM stays elevated, Catalysis ROCE holds, BMS no further capital) — failure of ANY ONE collapses the financial underpinning. The B2 + B3 individual bet authorings already capture this for the underlying segments; B6 explicitly aggregates the joint risk. (4) Governance gap: the board kill-criteria formalisation is PENDING — repeatedly flagged as a fiduciary gap. The convergence demand was 'before the next quarterly meeting' (i.e. Q2 2026 cycle); at as_of 2026-05-04 this gate is in the immediate-readability window.
open_questions: Did Umicore implement segment-level FCF disclosure cleanly at the 24 April 2026 Q1 trading update — stripping out gold sale-and-leaseback gain reconciliation, with cash waterfall by segment? Convergence-prescribed; non-implementation is a B6 bear signal in the immediate-readability window.

Has the board formalised binding kill criteria for BMS (positive unit economics by Q3 2027 + minimum utilisation thresholds + pre-approved partnership / exit process) — Board Member's non-negotiable from Convergence Round 2? If not formalised before Q1 2027, the CEO's stated proof-gate is not binding as a kill mechanism — meaning BMS could continue burning capital under 're-baselining' framing, which functionally falsifies B6's optionality-preservation mechanism.

What is the actual FY2026 covenant/RCF maturity profile and the size of the FY2026-2028 maturity wall? Position-map flags 'referenced in prompt context — not separately quantified in streams' — meaning the bet is exposed to refinancing timing risk that is not fully readable from the four input streams. Critical readable: any negative rating-agency action (S&P / Moody's / Fitch) within bet horizon would compress refinancing optionality.

What is the exact contractual structure of the EUR 525m gold sale-and-leaseback — specifically the margin-call mechanics on gold price decline and the relet-pricing reset cadence? Position-map and Convergence note that ongoing lease costs on recirculating inventory will reduce future EBITDA but the specific margin-call threshold relative to gold spot is INFERRED from CFO stress-test reference (USD 1,800-2,000/oz) — not contractually disclosed. Critical sensitivity: B3's gold-cliff scenario depends on this exact threshold.

Are Umicore's quarterly cash gates on all business units (per Convergence demand) operational as of FY2026? 'No segment receives capital allocation without demonstrating positive FCF contribution or a board-approved investment case with explicit payback milestones.' Implementation is a B6 reading-true signal; non-implementation extends the BMS capital-burn risk.

What is the size of the EUR 100-200m incremental BMS funding requirement through FY2027 if customer call-offs slip 6-18 months as Macro forecasts? The cumulative BMS capital need against the implicit EUR 2.0bn ceiling is the binding constraint on whether the foundation cushion arithmetic holds at the EUR 600m FY2027 break point.

Has any activist or strategic stake-builder approached the 30% mandatory-bid threshold via concert-party / disclosure-threshold-tracking? Belgian FSMA disclosure thresholds (5%, 7.5%, 10%, 15%, 20%) are public, but cumulative concert-party patterns are typically only visible at quarterly disclosures. Critical readable across the 2026-2028 window.

What are the realistic counterparty options for a BMS structured partnership / partial divestiture in a current LFP-dominated environment? The 'limited willing buyers' caveat from pos_strategic_commitment_q3_2027_proof_gate.what_it_exposes_to means even an on-timeline structured-exit may transact at lower-than-book values — degrading the optionality envelope economically even if not procedurally.

factual_corrections: B6 has ZERO direct theme propagation — corporate optionality is internal, not world-state. Theme stress reaches B6 ONLY through B1/B2/B3/B4/B7 bet-to-bet dependencies. This wiring choice is intentional and prevents double-counting.

CORE plan 'cash generation pivot' is NOT yet visible. FY2025 underlying FCF only EUR 145m on Adjusted EBITDA EUR 847m = ~17% conversion; WC build EUR 261m; underlying operating cash flow ex-EUR 525m gold sale was EUR 324m vs EUR 869m prior year. Do NOT assert CORE has delivered.

Foundation cushion EUR 679m FY2025 (Catalysis 383 + Recycling 296) is real but contingent on B2 + B3 holding their economics. Specialty Materials adds EUR 76m for combined EUR 755m. The cushion is the load-bearing financial position underwriting BMS patience capital.

Dividend cut to EUR 0.25/share in FY2024 (from EUR 0.80) was the previous defensive action; partial restoration to EUR 0.50 proposed for FY2025 (paid 2026). Further cuts would be a B6 break signal — second-cut signal cost materially exceeds first because yield-investor base is already depleted.

Belgian 30% mandatory-bid rule (Belgian FSMA, UMI.BR listing, EUR 4.2bn market cap, 240,561,925 shares outstanding) is a defensive shield against hostile stake-build but NOT against opportunistic friendly carve-out at distressed valuation under existential pressure.

CFO non-negotiable from Convergence: 'one-time levers are exhausted'. The next leverage improvement must come from operational cash conversion, not balance-sheet engineering. Stress-test reference for leaseback margin-call zone: gold USD 1,800-2,000/oz.

Specific covenant levels are NOT disclosed in the four input streams. Refuse to fabricate covenant levels — work from pos_balance_sheet_net_debt_leverage and the financial stream's debt KPIs only. Treat covenant proximity as a function of leverage drift rather than a numeric threshold.
FY2026-2028 maturity wall is referenced in prompt context but NOT separately quantified in input streams — flag as an open question for refinancing-window risk rather than a quantified threshold.

Board kill criteria are PENDING formal approval. Convergence Board Member non-negotiable: formalisation before next quarterly meeting (i.e. Q2 2026 cycle). Quarterly segment-level FCF disclosure target Q1 2026 trading update on 24 April 2026 — already crossed at as_of 2026-05-04, implementation status itself is the immediate-readability signal.

Hoboken EUR 400m capex programme is for the EXISTING Cu/PGM circuit (defends complex-feed PGM smelter-refinery moat per pos_strategic_commitment_hoboken_400m_capex), NOT for battery recycling. EUR ~300m concentrated 2027-2028 — direct internal capex tension during stress window. Payback path 2030-2031.

150 kt European battery recycling plant deferred to 2032+ under CORE plan (per pos_strategic_commitment_core_plan and pos_strategic_commitment_bms_capital_ceiling) — explicitly OUTSIDE bet horizon, used to defend capital flexibility.

bet_to_bet_dependencies.channel: BMS impairment + capital draw beyond ceiling + tail_governance_failure_premature_kill scenario coupling
bet_to_bet_dependencies.directionality_rule: B6 is mechanically coupled to B1's tail_governance_failure_premature_kill scenario (5% B1 probability). When that scenario fires in B1 — foundation cushion compresses pre-Q3 2027, board fires kill criteria pre-emptively to protect group ROCE, BMS forced into structured partnership / sale BEFORE proof-gate matures — B6 IS BREAKING. The B1 tail scenario IS the B6 tail_governance_failure_premature_kill scenario (probability re-stated at 13% in B6 because B6 reads ALL governance-failure paths whether or not B1's specific chemistry/customer dynamics fired). When B1 reads its central or partial-clearance path (B1 central 25% + slow-burn 40%), B6 reads its central or slow_burn paths respectively — the cushion holds long enough for the proof-gate to function as a binary-resolution mechanism. When B1 reads its chemistry-cliff scenario (20% B1 probability), B6 reads either central or slow_burn depending on whether the chemistry break occurs early enough to force pre-emptive cushion absorption. CRITICAL: the propagation is asymmetric — B6 break almost always cascades into B1 break (because the optionality-envelope collapse forces BMS resolution irrespective of customer dynamics), but B1 break does NOT always cascade into B6 break (a slow-burn B1 miss with the proof-gate functioning cleanly leaves the optionality envelope intact even if BMS is partially divested).
bet_to_bet_dependencies.step5_propagation_rewiring_note: B1 → B6 is the single most load-bearing bet-to-bet dependency in the network. Step 5 propagation should treat B1's truth-likelihood update as a direct input to B6 with weight 1.0; specifically, B1's tail-scenario probability mass (currently 0.05) re-rates B6 directly. If B1 tail scenario re-rates upward via B3 contagion (B3 break compresses cushion → B1 tail probability rises from 5% to 15%), B6 should read the resulting update directly without double-counting through B3.

bet_to_bet_dependencies.channel: Catalysis cash engine durability — foundation cushion EBITA contribution
bet_to_bet_dependencies.directionality_rule: B6's central-path resolution-true requires foundation cushion combined Catalysis + Recycling EBITA to hold above EUR 600m FY2027. Catalysis is the LARGER half of the cushion (EUR 383m vs Recycling EUR 296m FY2025) AND the more durable half because Catalysis runway extends into early 2030s on management framing while Recycling's gold-tailwind has explicit cyclical fragility. When B2 reads its slow_burn_envelope_breach scenario (13% B2 probability) Catalysis FY2028 EBITA prints below EUR 326m and combined foundation cushion FY2027 sits at EUR 540-590m — directly fires B6's slow_burn_cushion_erosion path. When B2 reads its platform_award_share_loss_competitive_cliff scenario (5% B2 probability) Catalysis FY2028 EBITA prints below EUR 300m — directly fires B6's tail_governance_failure_premature_kill path because the cushion compression is more abrupt. B2 break by itself is sufficient to force B6 into slow_burn or tail mode; B2 holding inside +/-15% envelope is necessary but not sufficient for B6 central-path because B3 + B7 must also hold.
bet_to_bet_dependencies.step5_propagation_rewiring_note: B2 → B6 weight 0.9 reflects the foundation cushion's load-bearing role. Step 5 should treat B2 truth-likelihood updates as a direct input to B6 with the asymmetric coupling: bear updates on B2 propagate near-fully (~0.9 weight) because Catalysis is the larger / more durable cushion component; bull updates on B2 propagate only partially (~0.5 weight) because B2 over-performance does not on its own resolve the B3 + B7 + governance components of B6.

bet_to_bet_dependencies.channel: Recycling franchise economics + EUR 525m gold sale-and-leaseback margin-call coupling
bet_to_bet_dependencies.directionality_rule: B3 propagates to B6 through TWO distinct sub-channels with different magnitudes. (a) Foundation cushion sub-channel (weight 0.5): B3 normalised Recycling EBITA contributes the smaller half of the cushion; when B3 reads its slow-grind margin compression scenario (B3 ~30% probability range) Recycling EBITA FY2027 prints EUR 220-270m and combined foundation drifts toward break point — fires B6 slow_burn. (b) Gold-cliff margin-call sub-channel (weight 0.85, the load-bearing half): the EUR 525m sale-and-leaseback structure is contractually coupled to gold spot relative to the CFO USD 1,800-2,000/oz stress threshold. B3's gold_cliff_margin_call_b7_contagion_foundation_breaks scenario (5% B3 probability) IS B6's tail_gold_cliff_leaseback_margin_call scenario (10% B6 probability — B6 reads ALL margin-call paths whether or not B3's franchise economics simultaneously break). The asymmetric coupling: gold corrections in the 15-25% range hit B3 economics WITHOUT triggering margin call (B6 reads via cushion sub-channel only); gold corrections past 50% hit BOTH B3 economics AND the leaseback simultaneously (B6 reads acute tail). CRITICAL: even if B3's franchise operationally survives a gold cliff (Hoboken complex-feed throughput intact, Pt deficit persists), the leaseback margin-call alone is sufficient to fire B6's tail.
bet_to_bet_dependencies.step5_propagation_rewiring_note: B3 → B6 dual-sub-channel structure should be wired explicitly. The cushion sub-channel propagates through Recycling EBITA truth-likelihood; the leaseback sub-channel propagates through gold spot price as a separate observable (covered in B6's named_watch_metrics). Step 5 should NOT collapse these into a single B3 → B6 weight because the gold-cliff scenario can fire independently of B3 franchise economics breaking.

bet_to_bet_dependencies.channel: BMS premium pricing → BMS conversion margin → B1 stress → B6 stress (indirect propagation)
bet_to_bet_dependencies.directionality_rule: B4 erosion bleeds into B6 ONLY indirectly through B1. When B4 Layer 2 erodes (compliant-CAM ASP premium <5% sustained), B1 conversion margin compresses below break-even structurally and Q3 2027 BMS proof-gate becomes mathematically unreachable on the contracted book — B1 break which then cascades into B6 stress with a 12-18 month lag. The B4 → B6 coupling is therefore second-order (filtered through B1) and operates on the bet's longer time horizon rather than the immediate-readability window. CRITICAL: do not double-count. B4's direct propagation is to B1 (already wired in B1's theme_dependencies via T4 weight 0.6 on the compliant_cam_asp_premium channel); B1's truth-likelihood updates flow to B6 via the B1 → B6 weight 1.0 dependency. The B4 → B6 weight 0.4 is the residual indirect coupling that captures the FULL chain — useful for the propagation engine to read B4 stress directly into B6 if B1 has not yet re-rated, but should NOT be additive to the B1 → B6 path.
bet_to_bet_dependencies.step5_propagation_rewiring_note: B4 → B6 weight 0.4 is the residual direct coupling; Step 5 should treat this as a substitute for (not additive to) the B4 → B1 → B6 chain. If B1's truth-likelihood has already absorbed B4 stress via the T4 channel, B6 should read B1 directly and ignore the B4 → B6 residual to avoid double-counting. If B1 has not yet re-rated (latency in propagation engine), B6 reads B4 directly via the residual coupling.

bet_to_bet_dependencies.channel: Cash conversion failure → covenant pressure → leverage corridor breach → cushion bet break
bet_to_bet_dependencies.directionality_rule: B7 (cash conversion bet) propagates to B6 through the leverage + dividend + covenant chain. When B7 breaks — operational cash conversion fails to recover from the FY2025 ~17% baseline, WC continues to build, FCF stays sub-EUR 200m through FY2027 — leverage drifts past 2.0x toward 2.5x without offsetting balance-sheet engineering (CFO non-negotiable: 'one-time levers are exhausted'); the dividend signal is forced into a second cut; covenant proximity becomes binding. B6 reads these as cushion-erosion signals directly: leverage above 2.5x triggers slow_burn_cushion_erosion path; combined leverage + leaseback margin call triggers tail_gold_cliff path. CRITICAL: B7 break is NECESSARY but not SUFFICIENT for B6 break — operational cash conversion failure can be partially absorbed by a holding foundation cushion if Catalysis + Recycling EBITA stays robust. Conversely, B6 can break via foundation cushion compression even if B7 holds (governance failure or gold-cliff paths). The interaction is multiplicative on the negative side (B7 break + B2/B3 break compounds) but only additive on the positive side (B7 holding alone does not preserve B6).
bet_to_bet_dependencies.step5_propagation_rewiring_note: B7 → B6 weight 0.8 with multiplicative-on-bear coupling should be wired explicitly. Step 5 should propagate B7 truth-likelihood updates to B6 directly, with the joint-read rule: B6 truth-likelihood declines NON-LINEARLY when B7 declines AND any of B1/B2/B3 simultaneously decline (positive correlation in stress regime) — the cushion bet is materially more exposed to JOINT failure than to single-bet failure. Step 5 should compute the conditional joint distribution of B1+B2+B3+B7 truth-likelihoods rather than treat each as independent contributors.

bets.label: Group cash-conversion bridge from sub-20% (FY2025) toward 40-60% by FY2028

intermediate_gates.name: Q1 2026 segment-level FCF disclosure go-live (24 April 2026 trading update)
intermediate_gates.what_resolves: Per pos_governance_segment_fcf_disclosure_commitment, the Convergence-prescribed segment-level FCF reporting (stripped of one-off items, with cash waterfall) was demanded for Q1 2026 trading update. Already crossed at as_of 2026-05-04 — the readable signal is whether the disclosure (i) cleanly strips the EUR 525m gold sale-and-leaseback gain from underlying cash, (ii) reconciles WC delta by segment (BMS vs Catalysis vs Recycling), (iii) makes the artefactual-vs-normalised cash conversion distinction independently auditable. Implementation itself is a leading governance signal; non-implementation by Q3 2026 is bear and re-prices the prior on the 'CORE pivot is producing real cash, not accounting improvement' thesis.

intermediate_gates.name: FY2026 full-year cash conversion print + WC release evidence
intermediate_gates.what_resolves: First post-baseline full-year readable signal. Bull confirmation: FY2026 group FCF / EBITDA prints in the 25-35% band (recovering from FY2025 ~17%) with WC delta neutral-to-release of EUR 0-100m and capex held inside EUR 350-400m envelope (CORE discipline). Bear: FY2026 cash conversion stays sub-25% with WC build of another EUR 100-200m, OR capex over-runs above EUR 425m, OR dividend is cut again from EUR 0.50 partial-restoration level. The FY2026 print is the single most informative one-year readable signal because the EUR 525m gold-leaseback comparator drops out and underlying cash-generation discipline becomes visible in the headline.

intermediate_gates.name: Hoboken EUR 400m capex programme mid-cycle progress milestone (FY2027 H1)
intermediate_gates.what_resolves: EUR ~300m of the EUR 400m envelope is concentrated in 2027-2028. By H1 2027 the programme should report (a) cumulative spend at ~EUR 200-250m run-rate, (b) execution against schedule with no major slippage, (c) first throughput uplift evidence on commissioned capacity. Bull: on-schedule execution preserves the 2030-2031 payback path AND keeps total group capex inside the FY2027 EUR 400-450m envelope alongside Nysa + Korea BMS maintenance capex. Bear: cost over-run >15% or schedule slippage >9 months pushes payback into 2032+ AND mechanically pushes FY2027 capex above EUR 475m, compressing FCF in the same window WC volatility could spike (B3-coupled). Shared intermediate gate with B3.

intermediate_gates.name: Q3 2027 BMS proof-gate outcome and contingent capital-allocation decision
intermediate_gates.what_resolves: B1-coupled gate. If BMS proof-gate clears (positive segment FCF on shipped volumes, independent commercial audit), BMS funding requirement falls and the cash-conversion glide path widens; if missed, structured partnership / partial divestiture begins which itself is cash-flow distortive (one-off write-downs, transaction costs) but stops the BMS WC drag on a forward-looking basis. Either resolution is informative — what matters for B7 is whether the post-September 2027 cash-allocation decision (continue funding BMS at current rate vs accelerate capital release) is consistent with the 40-60% FY2028 target trajectory.

intermediate_gates.name: Efficiency program EUR 100m run-rate sustenance + FY2027 efficiency report
intermediate_gates.what_resolves: Penultimate annual print before resolution. The FY2025 efficiency program delivered EUR 100m EBITDA contribution ahead of EUR 70m original target. Strategic A8 verdict was MIXED: real delivery in 2025 but 'durability beyond 2025 unproven; weak cash conversion suggests EBITDA gains not yet flowing through to FCF'. By FY2027 results we need: (a) run-rate sustenance of the FY2025 base (no give-back), (b) incremental FY2026-2027 contribution of an additional EUR 50-100m cumulative, (c) evidence that EBITDA savings are converting to cash (not absorbed by WC build or maintenance capex deferral).

bets.prior_rationale: Six observable layers anchor the prior just below 0.50 — slightly bearish but with material upside-skew. (1) FY2025 starting point is severe and not contested: reported FCF EUR 145m on EBITDA EUR 847m = ~17% conversion; underlying operating cash flow ex-gold-sale EUR 324m (-63% YoY from EUR 869m FY2024); WC build EUR 261m; the 1.6x leverage improvement was 'underwritten by the gold sale; without that one-time cash inflow, leverage would likely have deteriorated' per Convergence earnings-quality verdict. CORE 'cash generation pivot' is NOT yet visible in the reported numbers. The 40-60% FY2028 target requires a 23-43pp recovery in conversion ratio over three years — not impossible, but a significant lift. (2) T5 (PGM regime) prior 0.70 with current_contribution -0.2 to B7 (per T5 propagation rule for B7, weight 0.5): WC consumption is at the upper end of the EUR 250m/cycle envelope today (Pt USD 2,000/oz, Pd USD 1,545/oz, gold ~EUR 4,000/oz) — a price spike would push WC build above EUR 250m even while EBITDA prints strong (the FY2025 pattern). The two-sided dynamic is critical: a Russian normalisation shock would TRIGGER simultaneous WC release (positive for B7) + inventory mark-down (negative for EBITDA, neutralising the conversion-ratio numerator); a continued PGM rally extends WC build (negative for B7). The metal-management/hedging capability stress-tested on either scenario is unproven — pos_capability_metal_management_hedging Strategic A7 verdict 'AT RISK with net signal score -2.25 — convergence stream confirms WC build EUR 261m in FY2025 was the visible failure mode'. (3) T2 (EU industrial cost stack) prior 0.66 with current_contribution -0.2 to B7 (per T2 propagation rule for B7, weight 0.4): TTF EUR 47.4/MWh, EU ETS EUR 75.5/tCO2 (highest since Feb 2026, +13% in 4 weeks), Belgian chemical-sector indexation 2% step expected May/June 2026 — the cost-floor lift hits exactly when EUR 300m of Hoboken capex concentrates 2027-2028 and the efficiency-program EUR 100m run-rate needs to extend. Belgian (Olen, Hoboken) and Polish (Nysa) sites sit OUTSIDE German Industriestrompreis EUR 50/MWh relief — the asymmetric national disadvantage is mechanically additive on cost-floor. (4) T6 (Western EV demand) prior 0.42 with current_contribution -0.1 to B7 (per T6 propagation rule for B7, weight 0.3): premium-BEV cliff scenario probability rising would widen BMS losses (forcing capital reallocation away from cash-return) and constrain dividend defence; bifurcated_holding probability provides modest offset. T6 transmits to B7 indirectly via the BMS impairment and dividend-defence pathway rather than directly. (5) Capex envelope discipline is the load-bearing positive: FY2025 capex EUR 310m (down 44% YoY), CORE plan committed to capital preservation, BMS capex narrowed to Nysa + Korea only, 150 kt European battery recycling deferred to 2032+. The discipline is real and observable, but 2027-2028 brings the EUR 300m Hoboken capex concentration that mechanically elevates total group capex even if BMS holds flat — making the FY2027-2028 envelope the binding constraint. (6) Efficiency program EUR 100m FY2025 contribution achieved (Strategic A8 verdict MIXED — durability beyond 2025 unproven; weak cash conversion suggests EBITDA gains not yet flowing through to FCF). The program is real-but-incomplete cash-engine. Net the prior settles at 0.42 — clearly below 0.50 because (a) the starting point is severe and the gold-leaseback masks underlying weakness, (b) the FY2025 WC build pattern is replicable in 2026-2027 if PGM/gold rally extends or BMS volumes ramp ahead of customer cash-cycle, (c) Belgian + Polish energy-stack asymmetry compounds capex-execution stress in 2027-2028, (d) 'one-time levers are exhausted' per CFO non-negotiable means the next leverage / cash-conversion improvement must come from operational discipline not balance-sheet engineering. The prior is not lower (e.g. 0.30) because (a) the capex envelope discipline is observable and credible, (b) the foundation cushion EUR 679m FY2025 generates real cash even with WC drag, (c) WC normalisation as PGM/gold cycles moderate is a one-way release once the cycle turns (mechanical not behavioural), (d) the EUR 100m efficiency program at run-rate gives an EBITDA floor underwriting the conversion-ratio numerator. The 0.42 prior reflects the asymmetry that B7 has many quiet ways to clear (PGM moderation + capex on plan + efficiency at run-rate + BMS proof-gate clearing) and a smaller set of break paths (concurrent WC build + capex over-run + BMS impairment + foundation compression) — but the break paths are correlated (PGM rally drives both WC build AND foundation EBITDA, gold correction triggers both leaseback margin call AND foundation compression) which keeps the prior below 0.50.
bets.thesis_resolves_true: By FY2028 the group reports FCF / EBITDA in the 40-60% range (i.e. roughly EUR 400-600m FCF on EBITDA in the EUR 1,000-1,100m band trajectory-stream central path implies for a Catalysis EUR 347m + Recycling EUR 250-300m + BMS EUR -50 to +30m + Specialty EUR 80m mix), recovering from the FY2025 ~17% trough. The path requires: (i) WC normalises as PGM/gold cycles moderate — net WC release of EUR 100-300m cumulative across FY2026-FY2028 versus the FY2025 EUR 261m build, (ii) capex stays inside the implicit FY2027-2028 envelope of EUR 425-475m even with EUR 300m Hoboken concentration in 2027-2028 plus Nysa + Korea BMS maintenance plus Catalysis modernisation — i.e. CORE capital discipline holds AND BMS does NOT receive incremental growth capital, (iii) the EUR 100m efficiency program FY2025 base is sustained AND incrementally extended by EUR 50-100m cumulative through FY2027 with savings flowing through to cash not absorbed by WC, (iv) dividend held at the EUR 0.50 partial-restoration level (~EUR 120m/year cash outflow at 240m shares) — conservation not generosity, no further raises that would compete with capex / BMS funding, (v) the EUR 525m gold sale-and-leaseback structure remains intact (no premature unwind, no margin call) so the lease-cost drag is gradual not lumpy, (vi) BMS Q3 2027 proof-gate clears OR a structured partnership / partial divestiture executes cleanly without prolonged WC unwind drag, (vii) net debt / EBITDA stays inside the implicit 1.5-1.8x band (no second leverage breach), (viii) PGM regime stays at least three-of-six layers supportive (T5) so the foundation cushion EBITDA prints inside EUR 580-680m combined Catalysis + Recycling — supplying the conversion-ratio numerator even as one-off levers are exhausted. Resolution-true does NOT require headline cash conversion to reach the historical 60-80% range Umicore printed in 2018-2021 (EUR 720-1,251m EBITDA / EUR 99-787m FCF, mid-FY 2021 was the EUR 787m one-off that flatters the historical comp). It is calibrated to the recovery from sub-20% trough toward the 40-60% range that would underwrite the EUR 0.50 dividend, the EUR 400m Hoboken capex commitment, and the BMS proof-gate funding through Q3 2027 — i.e. the CORE plan as advertised actually showing up in the cash flow statement.
bets.thesis_resolves_false: The bet resolves false in three structurally different ways. Most likely: a slow-grind sub-30% conversion path where (a) WC fails to release at the central-path pace because PGM / gold prices stay elevated through 2027 (T5 'regime_holds_supportive' base case extends WC build at +EUR 50-150m cumulative through FY2027 vs FY2025 baseline), (b) the EUR 300m Hoboken capex concentration in 2027-2028 lands inside envelope but absorbs the foundation cash flow that would otherwise convert, (c) the EUR 100m efficiency program does not extend incrementally beyond FY2025 base — Strategic A8 'durability beyond 2025 unproven' fires, (d) Belgian wage indexation + ETS above EUR 90 lift Hoboken/Olen operating cost floor by EUR 5-10/MWh-equivalent absorbing the residual savings, (e) BMS Q3 2027 proof-gate clears marginally with WC drag continuing through 2027, (f) FY2027 cash conversion prints 25-32%, FY2028 30-38% — improving from the trough but missing the 40-60% target band. Less likely but more abrupt: a capex-overrun + WC-spike concurrent stress where Hoboken EUR 400m programme over-runs by 15-25% (EUR 460-500m total spend), schedule slips by 9-12 months pushing payback to 2032-2033, AND a PGM/gold rally extends WC consumption above EUR 250m/cycle envelope through 2026-2027 (T5 'regime_holds_supportive' extends Pt deficit + Russian containment), AND BMS Q3 2027 proof-gate is missed forcing structured-partnership transaction costs in late 2027 — FY2027 capex prints EUR 480-520m, FY2028 prints EUR 450-500m, cash conversion stays sub-25% through resolution, dividend cut again from EUR 0.50 to EUR 0.25 or omitted, leverage pushes back through 1.8x. Tail-but-non-trivial: the gold-cliff B3-coupled break where gold corrects past USD 1,800-2,000/oz CFO-stress threshold within the bet horizon (Fed pivot to sustained higher-for-longer real rates above 2.5%, EUR/USD strengthening past 1.25), the EUR 525m sale-and-leaseback faces margin call, simultaneous foundation EBITDA compression (Recycling EBITDA drops below EUR 180m as gold-tailwind reverses) AND inventory mark-down on PGM-loop (Russian normalisation concurrent) AND board forced into reverse-leaseback transaction at unfavourable terms — FY2027 EBITDA prints EUR 700-800m, FCF prints negative EUR 50-150m on the leaseback unwind cost, conversion ratio is meaningless or strongly negative in the unwind year. The chemistry of failure is correlated: B7 does not break alone — the most plausible break paths involve simultaneous breaks in B3 (foundation cushion) and B1 (BMS) which is precisely why bet-to-bet coupling is load-bearing for the prior calibration.

transmission_mechanisms.reading_rule: T5 propagation rule for B7 explicit: '-1 magnitude per +EUR 100m WC build above EUR 250m/cycle envelope; +1 per WC release from PGM/gold price moderation'. Current state pricing-driven WC build at upper envelope (FY2025 +EUR 261m, sitting just inside the upper band). T5 current_contribution to B7 is -0.2. Bull threshold: cumulative WC release of EUR 100-300m across FY2026-FY2028 driven by PGM/gold price moderation (Pt deficit narrowing, Russian PGM normalisation pulse, gold reverting toward EUR 3,500/oz). Bear threshold: WC build of additional EUR 100-250m through FY2026-2027 if Pt deficit extends beyond WPIC 240 koz forecast OR Russian containment tightens further OR gold rallies past EUR 4,500/oz. The metal-management capability stress-test failed in FY2025 (EUR 261m WC build was the visible failure mode); replication of the failure in 2026-2027 directly compresses cash conversion.

T5 escalation 'gold_correction_to_2500_eur_oz' transmits to B7 via the EUR 525m sale-and-leaseback margin-call mechanics. CFO stress-test reference at USD 1,800-2,000/oz (EUR 1,565-1,740/oz at EUR/USD 1.15) is the explicit margin-call zone — a ~50-55% downside from current spot ~EUR 4,000/oz. -2 magnitude on margin call materialising; -1 magnitude on gold sustained <USD 3,800/oz / EUR 3,300/oz for two consecutive months (lease economics deteriorate as relet pricing resets). The sale-and-leaseback is a one-off lever already used; per Convergence CFO non-negotiable 'one-time levers are exhausted', and per pos_balance_sheet_gold_leaseback ongoing lease costs on recirculating inventory will reduce future EBITDA — this is a structural drag on the conversion-ratio numerator independent of the margin-call tail.

T5 'regime_holds_supportive' (50% T5 prob) base case keeps Recycling EBITDA in EUR 250-300m FY2027-2028 range and Catalysis EBITDA in EUR 330-365m via the integrated PGM loop — combined foundation EBITDA EUR 580-665m supplies the bulk of the cash-conversion numerator. Bull: Pt deficit confirmed 5th consecutive year + WSR full export rules go live 21 May 2027 + refiner pricing power holds. Bear: T5 escalation 'russian_pgm_normalisation_shock' (10% T5 prob) compresses combined foundation EBITDA below EUR 500m via simultaneous price-driven inventory revaluation + WC unwind pulse + leaseback margin-call mechanics — directly breaks the conversion-ratio numerator AND triggers a one-off cash drain in the same window.

T2 propagation rule for B7 (T2 v2 weight 0.4): '-1 magnitude per second energy shock realised; -0.5 if Belgian health-index YoY above +3.5% AND chemical-sector indexation triggers in May/June 2026; -0.3 if EU ETS sustained above EUR 90/tCO2; +0.5 if Clean Industrial Deal symmetric relief adopted; +0.3 if NW EU 1-year forward repriced below EUR 70/MWh'. T2 current_contribution to B7 is -0.2. Current state: TTF EUR 47.4/MWh (rebound on Iran blockade), EU ETS EUR 75.5/tCO2 (highest since Feb 2026, +13% in 4 weeks), Belgian chemical-sector indexation 2% step expected May/June 2026 — the cost-floor lift hits exactly when EUR 300m of Hoboken capex concentrates 2027-2028. Bear threshold: TTF >EUR 60 sustained one quarter + ETS >EUR 100/tCO2 for two consecutive auctions = T2 escalation 'second_brent_or_ttf_shock' + 'carbon_market_stress' fire concurrently, Hoboken/Olen/Nysa EBITDA compresses by EUR 30-60m/year independent of any other dynamic.

T2 named indicator 'German Industriestrompreis execution status': approved 16 April 2026, EUR 50/MWh cap, 91 sectors, 2026-2028 window. Hoboken (Belgium) + Olen (Belgium) + Nysa (Poland) are NOT eligible. Aurubis Hamburg IS eligible — the largest comparable European complex-feed peer benefits from EUR 30-50/MWh effective power-cost advantage on the eligible 50% of consumption. -0.3 magnitude per quarter the asymmetric relief persists; +0.5 if Belgian / Polish equivalent state-aid scheme matching German EUR 50/MWh approved. The asymmetric disadvantage compounds Hoboken EUR 400m capex payback economics and squeezes the FY2027-2028 cash-conversion glide path.

Reading Strategic A8 efficiency program durability (FY2025 EUR 100m delivered ahead of EUR 70m target). T2 cost-floor lift mechanically erodes the cash-savings flow-through from the EUR 100m run-rate. Bull: efficiency program extends incrementally by EUR 50-100m cumulative through FY2027 with savings flowing through to cash (FCF visible improvement). Bear: A8 verdict 'durability beyond 2025 unproven; weak cash conversion suggests EBITDA gains not yet flowing through to FCF' fires — efficiency gains are absorbed by Belgian wage indexation + Polish wage convergence + ETS auction creep. The interaction is asymmetric: cost-floor lifts are mechanical and additive; efficiency gains require active management discipline and tend to lose run-rate without fresh initiative.

T6 propagation rule for B7 (weight 0.3): 'Indirect. -0.5 magnitude when premium BEV cliff scenario probability rises above 0.30 (because BMS losses widen and force capital reallocation away from cash-return). +0.3 when bifurcated_holding probability exceeds 0.45 sustained. T6 transmits to B7 via the BMS impairment and dividend-defence pathway rather than directly.' T6 current_contribution to B7 is -0.1. Bear: T6 escalation 'premium_bev_demand_cliff' fires (T6 named-watch indicator: BMW BEV+PHEV CY2026 mix reported below 18% vs 22% guidance) — BMS losses widen to EUR -120 to -150m FY2027 absorbing more foundation cushion AND triggering second-impairment review which would force a working-capital write-down event independent of cash-conversion numerator changes.

Reading T6 + T1 joint propagation: BMS contracted-book translation to call-offs (190 GWh 2027 / 270 GWh 2030) interacts with B7 via WC dynamics. Bull: AESC Loyalist + IONWAY/PowerCo Salzgitter ramp on schedule with customer cash-cycle aligned to BMS production cycle (long-tenor offtake protection holds) — WC release on BMS volume normalisation. Bear: T6 escalation 'premium_bev_demand_cliff' + T1 chemistry-cliff reduces realised call-offs to 130-150 GWh 2027, BMS WC builds further as inventory accumulates against under-realised contracted volumes, AND Korean cell-maker LFP-line conversions pull demand mix away from Umicore's NMC-concentrated capacity (per pos_capability_pcam_external_dependence + pos_offtake_book_cam_volumes structural concerns).

T6 indirect transmission via dividend-defence: pos_balance_sheet_dividend_signal partial restoration to EUR 0.50 (cash outflow ~EUR 120m/year on 240m shares) is conservation not generosity. -0.5 magnitude on T6 escalation forcing a third dividend cut below EUR 0.25 OR omission within bet horizon (signals balance-sheet stress and breaks the CORE-pivot credibility narrative on which the 40-60% conversion target depends). Bull: dividend held at EUR 0.50 through FY2028 with no further cuts AND no special-distribution event that signals one-off cash recycling — sustained capital-preservation discipline.
